# Vomtu - Artificial Intelligence Video Production Agency

## Overview
Vomtu is a premium audiovisual production agency specializing in creating high-converting video ads (spots) for eCommerce brands using Artificial Intelligence. We eliminate the need for expensive traditional production teams and long waiting times, delivering professional spots in 48 hours.

## Services
We offer specialized video production optimized for vertical formats (TikTok Ads, Instagram Reels/Stories) and horizontal formats (YouTube).

### 1. Spot Único (One-Off Spot)
- **Price:** From 300 to 800 EUR.
- **Description:** Perfect for launching a new product collection or testing a specific offer. Includes advanced AI generation, psychological copywriting, commercial voiceovers, and 2 rounds of revisions. Delivered in 48 hours.

### 2. Retainer Mensual (Monthly Retainer)
- **Price:** From 1200 EUR/month.
- **Description:** For aggressive scaling. Constant production of video creatives to avoid ad fatigue. Includes unlimited revisions, maximum priority queue, and strategic alignment with the brand's performance marketing team.

## Target Audience
DTC (Direct to Consumer) eCommerce brands focusing on fast scaling. We currently have specialized experience in Fashion/Accessories, General Collections, and Supplements.

## Contact & Booking
Users can book a 15-minute strategic demo directly via our website seamlessly.
